data.text:
Committed. AC satisfied:
- Summary card numbers: `text-headline-md font-headline-md` (lines 236, 257, 284, 310, 315, 321, 328)
- Status badge (375): `text-label-caps font-label-caps`
- Billing badge (387): `text-label-caps font-label-caps`
- Tooltip info buttons (247, 273, 300): `text-label-caps font-label-caps`
- Table cells: removed inherited `text-sm` from `<table>`; added explicit `text-body-sm` to toggle/harness/status cells; expanded-row container now `text-body-sm`. Cells with `text-body-sm` or `font-mono-code text-mono-code` now carry explicit body tokens.
